data.body: AC amendment: Use filesystem mtime (stat -c %Y / stat -f %m) for file age detection in pruning step, with cross-platform fallback. Add AC: document that file age is determined by mtime. Explicitly derive TRACKER_DIR as REPO_ROOT/.tickets-tracker, consistent with ticket-lib.sh convention — reuse whatever TRACKER_DIR variable the synthesis section from story 434c-ca05 introduces rather than creating a parallel derivation.
